title: Can't Log Into my Mail
creator: lamplmairherbert
content: I can't read my mails and every time i open Thunderbird i get told that my registration failed and i have 3 Options to choose "try again", "enter new password" and "cancel". Doesnt matter ehich one I choose i can't read my mails or receive any and the same message and the same options pop up again.

title: how to stop fishing scam emails getting to my Focussed Email
creator: andyjpriestman
content: I was in Sweden and got the Skånetrafiken App on my mobile. Now I have a steady stream of Swedish Scam emails that go direct to my inbox. I have been reporting them but they keep coming daily. What can I do?
